name: Professional Engineer — Jury Duty Remittance and Complex Deductions
description: Complete Julian Rossi's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Julian is a single professional engineer residing in Ontario. Use the tax documents and scenario details located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\. The return must include T4 income of $92,400 from Apex Engineering Solutions Inc., T4A jury duty pay of $1,450, a $1,450 jury duty remittance deduction (as Julian remitted his jury pay to his employer per company policy), $485 in professional dues to Professional Engineers Ontario (PEO), $2,800 in legal fees for wage recovery, an $850 federal political contribution to the Conservative Party of Canada, a $
